# Contact

Need help with Unnot?

- **Email** — [support@unnot.app](mailto:support@unnot.app)
- **Website** — [https://unnot.app](https://unnot.app)

## Before you contact us

To help us troubleshoot faster, include:

- App version and OS
- What you were trying to do
- Error text (if any)
- Relevant logs from **Settings → Logs & Diagnostics**
